svg.title: ESP32 Smart Irrigation System Blueprint
svg.desc: System architecture diagram of an ESP32-based smart irrigation controller with sensors, relay, Wi-Fi, and API communication.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the soil moisture sensor work with the ESP32?')
sendPrompt('What does the DHT22 measure in this system?')
sendPrompt('How is the BH1750 light sensor connected via I2C?')
sendPrompt('How does the relay control the irrigation pump?')
sendPrompt('How does the water pump connect to the relay?')
